insight: Customers on month-to-month contracts are 2.5x more likely to churn.
Customers with tenure < 12 months and monthly charges > $70 have a 56% churn rate.
Fiber optic customers churn at 47% vs 36% for DSL — investigate service quality.
Senior citizens have a 40% churn rate vs 37% for non-seniors.
Electronic check users churn at 41% vs 36% for auto-payment customers.
Top churn drivers: tenure, Contract_Month-to-month, Contract_Two year.
